zh.lifeSummary: 當Gruffudd ab Ednyfed Fychan於1186年出生在英國威爾斯可爾德吉爾凱時，他的父親Ednyfed Fychan ap Cynwrig of Dules37歲，母親Gwenllian II ferch Lord Rhys22歲。他與Gwenllian verch Hywel在英國威爾斯結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1277年7月在威爾士丹比爾利朗哈法爾享年91歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gruffudd ab Ednyfed Fychan于1186年出生在英国威尔斯可爾德吉爾凱时，他的父亲Ednyfed Fychan ap Cynwrig of Dules37岁，母亲Gwenllian II ferch Lord Rhys22岁。他与Gwenllian verch Hywel在英国威尔斯结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1277年7月在威尔士丹比爾利朗哈法爾享年91岁。

nameMeanings.name: ab
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Eberhard.
Swedish: soldier's name, apparently from ax ‘ear (i.e. the part of a cereal plant which contains its flowers or seeds)’.

variants.name: Akes
meanings: German: possibly a variant of Ax . The surname Akes is virtually non-existing in Germany.

variants.name: Axt
meanings: German: metonymic occupational name for a woodcutter, carpenter, or maker of axes, from Middle High German ackes, axt- ‘axe’.

nameMeanings.name: Fychan
meanings: Welsh: A Welsh name of great antiquity, from vyckan, little, small; i.e. small in stature. Compare the surname Bychan and the Armoric Le Bihan.

nameMeanings.name: Gruffudd
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Old Welsh Grip(p)iud, from an unexplained first element + a second element meaning ‘lord, prince’. Gruffydd ap Llewelyn ( d. 1063 ) was one of the most able rulers of Wales in the Middle Ages, scoring notable victories over the English until he was eventually defeated by King Harold in 1063 .

variants.name: Griffudd
meanings: From Old Welsh Grip(p)iud, from an unexplained first element + a second element meaning ‘lord, prince’. Gruffydd ap Llewelyn ( d. 1063 ) was one of the most able rulers of Wales in the Middle Ages, scoring notable victories over the English until he was eventually defeated by King Harold in 1063 .

variants.name: Gruffud
meanings: From Old Welsh Grip(p)iud, from an unexplained first element + a second element meaning ‘lord, prince’. Gruffydd ap Llewelyn ( d. 1063 ) was one of the most able rulers of Wales in the Middle Ages, scoring notable victories over the English until he was eventually defeated by King Harold in 1063 .

en.lifeSummary: When Gruffudd ab Ednyfed Fychan was born in 1186, in Cilcain, Clwyd, Wales, United Kingdom, his father, Ednyfed Fychan ap Cynwrig of Dules, was 37 and his mother, Gwenllian II ferch Lord Rhys, was 22. He married Gwenllian verch Hywel in Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. He died in July 1277, in Llangynhafal, Denbighshire, Wales, at the age of 91.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gruffudd ab Ednyfed Fychan est né en 1186, à Cilcain, Clwyd, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Ednyfed Fychan ap Cynwrig of Dules, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Gwenllian II ferch Lord Rhys, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Gwenllian verch Hywel à Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé en juillet 1277, à Llangynhafal, Denbighshire, Galles, à l’âge de 91 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gruffudd ab Ednyfed Fychan 1186 in Cilcain, Clwyd, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ednyfed Fychan ap Cynwrig of Dules 37 und seine Mutter Gwenllian II ferch Lord Rhys 22. Er hat in Wales, United Kingdom Gwenllian verch Hywel geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb im Juli 1277 im Alter von 91 Jahren in Llangynhafal, Denbighshire, Wales.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gruffudd ab Ednyfed Fychan è nato il nel 1186 nel Cilcain, Clwyd, Galles, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Ednyfed Fychan ap Cynwrig of Dules, aveva 37 anni e il suo madre, Gwenllian II ferch Lord Rhys, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Gwenllian verch Hywel nel Galles, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel luglio 1277, nel Llangynhafal, Denbighshire, Galles, all'età di 91 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Gruffudd ab Ednyfed Fychanが1186年にイギリスウェールズクルウイドシルケインで生まれた時，父Ednyfed Fychan ap Cynwrig of Dulesは37歳，母Gwenllian II ferch Lord Rhysは22歳であった。イギリスウェールズでGwenllian verch Hywelと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1277年7月にウェールズデンビグhシュアイアラングインハファルで91歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Gruffudd ab Ednyfed Fychan(이)가 1186년 영국 웨일스 클w이드 시카인에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ednyfed Fychan ap Cynwrig of Dules(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Gwenllian II ferch Lord Rhys(은)는 22세였다. 그는 영국 웨일스에서 Gwenllian verch Hywel(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1277년 7월 웨일스 덴비그h실르 랭이하팔에서 91세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gruffudd ab Ednyfed Fychan nasceu em 1186, em Cilcain, Clwyd, Gales, United Kingdom, seu pai, Ednyfed Fychan ap Cynwrig of Dules, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Gwenllian II ferch Lord Rhys, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Gwenllian verch Hywel em Gales, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em julho de 1277, em Llangynhafal, Denbighshire, Gales, com 91 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gruffudd ab Ednyfed Fychan родился в 1186 г. в местности силкеин, клвид, Уэльс, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Ednyfed Fychan ap Cynwrig of Dules было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Gwenllian II ferch Lord Rhys, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Gwenllian verch Hywel в местности Уэльс, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер июль 1277 г. в местности ллангинафаль, денбаишир, Уэльс в возрасте 91 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gruffudd ab Ednyfed Fychan nació en 1186, en Cilcain, Clwyd, Gales, Reino Unido, su papá, Ednyfed Fychan ap Cynwrig of Dules, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Gwenllian II ferch Lord Rhys, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Gwenllian verch Hywel en Gales, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en julio de 1277, en Llangynhafal, Denbighshire, Gales, a la edad de 91 años.
